notes: Recovered as the central federal-democratic polity. Governance, major pressure lines, and strategic role are strongly corroborated by later engine materials.
government_type: Federal democracy with Senate governance and Chancellor executive
diplomatic_status: Recognizes Prime Construct as a cooperative sovereign AI in the recovered political track.

notes: The recovered material already distinguishes Prime Construct from generic hostile AI factions. This cooperative-sovereign interpretation is retained in later engine outputs.

diplomatic_status: Recognized by the Galactic Union in the recovered diplomatic split.

notes: This dossier captures the hostile branch implied by the recovered AI split. The exact canonical normalization between this concept and later engine labels such as AI Warlord Nemesis remains unresolved.
diplomatic_status: Represents the hostile branch split from cooperative AI sovereignty.

notes: Recovered as escalating anti-Union movements in the outer colonies. Later engine materials normalize this bloc as a confederation.
